message:
feat(freeze): Convert stack manipulation operations to Zig

Converted 9 stack operations:
- drop: Pop and free value from stack
- dup, dup1, dup2, dup3: Duplicate top 1-3 stack values
- nip, nip1: Remove second/third value keeping top
- swap, swap2: Swap top 2/4 stack values

Stack manipulation patterns in Zig:
- Direct stack array access: stack[@intCast(sp - 1)]
- POP via block expr: { sp -= 1; const v = stack[@intCast(sp)]; v; }
- PUSH via: stack[@intCast(sp)] = value; sp += 1
- DUP uses qjs.FROZEN_DUP for reference counting
- All operations preserve exact C semantics in Zig
